name: STARWOOD PROPERTY TRUST, INC.
summary: Starwood Property Trust, Inc. (STWD) is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that operates across multiple segments including commercial and residential lending, infrastructure lending, investing and servicing, and commercial real estate ownership. The company originates and acquires commercial mortgage loans, CMBS, residential loans, B-Notes, mezzanine loans, CLOs, and infrastructure loans primarily in the power and midstream oil and gas industries. It is externally managed by SPT Management, LLC, an affiliate of Starwood Capital Group Global, L.P.

products.name: Commercial Mortgage Loans
products.description: Origination and acquisition of loans secured by commercial real estate properties.

products.name: CMBS Investments
products.description: Investment in commercial mortgage-backed securities including subordinated tranches.

products.name: Residential Loans
products.description: Acquisition and origination of residential loans including non-QM loans.

products.name: Infrastructure Loans
products.description: Lending to infrastructure projects concentrated in power and midstream oil and gas industries.

products.name: B-Notes
products.description: Acquisition of privately negotiated subordinate commercial real estate debt instruments.

products.name: Mezzanine Loans
products.description: Origination of mezzanine loans secured by income-producing commercial properties.

products.name: CLOs
products.description: Sponsorship and investment in junior securities of collateralized loan obligations.

products.name: Net Lease Properties
products.description: Investment in commercial properties subject to net leases.

products.name: Special Servicing
products.description: Commercial real estate loan special servicing activities within the Investing and Servicing Segment.

partnerships.description: Parent organization providing management services through affiliate SPT Management, LLC under a management agreement.
External manager of Starwood Property Trust, affiliate of Starwood Capital Group, providing operational and management services.
